DeepPhe

A Natural Language Processing System for Extracting Cancer Phenotypes from Clinical Records.

DeepPhe combines natural language processing, summarization, data models, and visual analytics to help researchers examine complex cancer cases and cohorts.

Choose DeepPhe Translational for translational studies and research cohorts, or DeepPhe-CR for cancer registry applications and registrar workflows.

For general background, please read and cite our introductory paper:

DeepPhe - A Natural Language Processing System for Extracting Cancer Phenotypes from Clinical Records Savova, et al. Cancer Res. 2017 Nov. 1. 77(21)e115-e118. DOI:10.1158/0008-5472.CAN-17-0615.

Download DeepPhe Translational for research

DeepPhe Translational extracts cancer phenotypes from clinical notes for translational studies and research cohorts. The installer also includes DeepPhe Visualizer 2 for reviewing individual cases and exploring cohort data. Choose your operating system to download the installer.

Recommended for your system Download for Windows 7.1, built 2026-07-13 DeepPhe_windows-7.1.exe Recommended for your system Download for macOS 7.1, built 2026-07-13 DeepPhe-7.1.dmg Recommended for your system Download for Linux 7.1, built 2026-07-13 DeepPhe_linux-x64-7.1.sh

Need software for a cancer registry? Use DeepPhe-CR Final for registrar and registry workflows.

View all downloads, tools, and source code →
